arts.ttl: Sarina Wiegman calls up three uncapped players for injury-hit Lionesses to face Emma Hayes’ USA
arts.sum: England play United States at Wembley before facing Switzerland at Bramall Lane

arts.ttl: England without injured James, Toone and Hemp for USA friendly
arts.sum: England Women will be without injured trio Lauren James, Ella Toone and Lauren Hemp when they face Emma Hayes' USA side at Wembley on November 30.
